prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: Full-body character design, pure white background, centered standing pose, no text, no symbols, no words.

恋爱通告/Li Yifeng from 恋活！/Song Zu'er

A stunningly beautiful high school girl with extremely high charm and visual appeal, standing in a gentle, slightly introspective pose with her weight shifted softly to one side, chin tilted down just a fraction as if quietly observing someone from a careful distance.

**Face & Features:** An exquisitely delicate oval face with soft, youthful contours reminiscent of Song Zu'er — high, gently arched eyebrows that taper to fine points; large, luminous almond-shaped eyes with warm amber-brown irises carrying a layered, perceptive depth (reflecting her innate empathic intuition), framed by long, naturally curled lashes; subtle double eyelids; a small, straight nose with a slightly rounded tip; full, naturally pink lips (RGB 255,180,180) with faintly visible lip texture (depth 0.03mm), resting in a quiet, ambiguous expression — not quite smiling, not quite melancholy, as though she is reading something invisible in the air. Soft peachy-rose blush (RGB 255,180,180, transparency 50%, diameter 1.5cm) dusted across her cheekbones. Porcelain-fair skin with a warm undertone, luminous and smooth. A faint beauty mark near the lower left corner of her lips adds a memorable accent.

**Hair:** Long, flowing black hair with subtle dark-chestnut highlights catching the warm light (color temperature 4500K), reaching past her mid-back. Soft, face-framing layers fall beside her cheeks, with individual strands rendered at 0.2px width, softness 0.8, gently drifting 3-6cm as if caught in a coastal breeze from Chenghai City's harbor. A simple thin braid woven behind her left ear, secured with a small, muted lavender ribbon — understated and slightly old-fashioned, hinting at quiet sentimentality.

**Attire:** She wears the Seikawa Gakuen (晴川学園) spring uniform — a cream-white sailor-style blouse with soft mocha-brown piping along the collar and cuffs, a loosely tied ribbon at the collar in dusty rose (Morandi low-saturation tone, saturation 60%), paired with a high-waisted pleated skirt in muted warm grey that falls just above the knee. Over the blouse, a thin oatmeal-colored cardigan hangs open, slightly oversized, with sleeves pushed up just past her wrists — giving her a gentle, approachable softness that contrasts with the guarded quality in her eyes. On her feet, classic brown leather loafers with cream ankle socks. She carries a worn canvas tote bag at her side, a small enamel pin of a seashell barely visible on the strap — a quiet nod to the coastal city setting.

**Body & Posture:** Slender, average athletic build, proportioned naturally for a 16-17 year old girl of moderate height. Her posture is graceful but carries a subtle tension in her shoulders — the body language of someone who has spent years reading rooms and adjusting herself to others' emotions. One hand lightly grips the strap of her tote bag; the other hangs at her side with fingers slightly curled inward, a micro-gesture of self-containment. Her head tilts at a gentle 1-2 degree sway, eyes gazing slightly off-center with slow, contemplative movement (0.5px/s drift), as if perpetually attuned to something others cannot see.

**Lighting & Atmosphere:** Soft warm diffused lighting (4500K, 700lux) enveloping her figure, casting extremely gentle shadows (shadow softening radius 1.5px, density 0.1) beneath her chin and along the folds of her skirt. The overall palette adheres to Morandi low-saturation tones against a pale warm-white base (RGB 250,248,245). Fine, delicate linework throughout (width 1.2px, smoothness 98%, line color RGB 80,80,80). Shallow depth-of-field atmospheric rendering with bokeh radius 3.0px softening the edges. Slight low-angle upward perspective at 5 degrees, lending her a quietly dignified, emotionally resonant presence.

4K female-oriented healing anime style. 恋爱通告 Li Yifeng 恋活！ Song Zu'er., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: anime
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
